summary: Full functional + regression coverage of admin panel (JWT), public spam protection (honeypot), and resume upload e2e. Created /app/backend/tests/test_admin_auth.py (20 tests, all pass) covering auth, admin gating (7 endpoints), CRUD on insights/jobs/partners/memberships with date round-trip & requirements-as-array, contact honeypot silent-drop verification (count delta + admin inbox scan), apply+resume e2e with PDF byte-prefix download check, apply honeypot drop, and invalid extension rejection. Re-ran prior regression suite (test_api.py, 9/9 pass). Frontend Playwright covered: wrong-password keeps user on login + shows error, correct password redirects to /admin dashboard, all 7 admin nav tabs load, full UI CRUD on an insight (create/edit/delete) with date round-trip verified via public API, logout, /admin without token redirect, public job apply with resume file (PDF) shows success, contact form submission shows success, resume appears in admin Applications inbox with working download button. Per-route document.title updates correctly on all 6 main routes. Zero console errors; one shadcn DialogContent aria-describedby a11y warning (non-blocking).

issues: shadcn DialogContent emits 'Missing Description or aria-describedby' warning on every open. A11y-only, cosmetic. Add a <DialogDescription> (or aria-describedby={undefined} suppression) in /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboard.jsx DialogContent.

passed_tests: Backend pytest 20/20 (test_admin_auth.py): login success+wrong-password, /api/auth/me bearer-required, all 7 /api/admin/* return 401 without token, invalid token → 401, insights CRUD with date round-trip + public slug fetch reflects update, jobs CRUD with requirements array preserved, partners+memberships CRUD, unknown collection 404, contact honeypot silent-drop (no DB write, no admin inbox entry), apply+resume e2e (POST 200 with id, admin inbox has_resume=true, download returns 200 application/pdf starting with %PDF), apply honeypot drop, .exe rejected with 422
Backend pytest 9/9 (test_api.py regression): health, insights list+by slug, jobs list+by slug, partners, memberships, contact POST, commodities optional
Frontend admin: wrong password → 'Invalid email or password' error, stays on /admin/login
Frontend admin: correct password → token (len=223) stored in localStorage 'pa_admin_token', redirects to /admin dashboard
Frontend admin: all 7 nav tabs clickable (insights/jobs/partners/memberships/contacts/inquiries/applications)

Frontend admin UI CRUD: created insight via dialog, appeared in list, public API /api/insights/{slug} returned 200 with date '2026-02-15T00:00:00' (date round-trip OK), edited title via UI, deleted via UI, item removed from list
Frontend admin: logout clears token and redirects to /admin/login
Frontend admin: visiting /admin without token redirects to /admin/login (ProtectedRoute works)
Frontend public: job apply form has honeypot (hidden), accepted PDF resume upload, showed 'Application submitted successfully!' toast and 'Application Received' success state
Frontend public: contact form has honeypot (hidden), submission showed 'Message sent successfully!' toast and 'Message Sent!' success state
Frontend integration: applied UI_TEST_Applicant visible in admin Applications inbox; download-resume buttons rendered (3 in inbox)
Per-route document.title: /, /about/who-we-are, /commodities/at-a-glance, /partners, /careers, /contact all show route-appropriate titles ending with '| Peninsula Agritrade LLC'
Zero console errors across login → dashboard → CRUD → logout → public site flows
action_items: (Low/cosmetic) Add <DialogDescription> to admin form Dialog in AdminDashboard.jsx to silence shadcn aria-describedby a11y warning.
critical_code_review_comments: Auth implementation looks solid: bcrypt via auth.hash_password/verify_password, JWT Bearer header, no cookies. seed_admin() correctly updates password on env change (lines 75-76 in server.py).

get_current_admin (server.py:108-122) properly returns 401 on missing/invalid Bearer AND 403 on non-admin role — verified 401 path with 7 endpoints; 403 path not directly verifiable without a non-admin user but code is correct.

Honeypot pattern is consistent across /api/contact, /api/careers/inquiry, and /api/jobs/apply: returns {success: true} WITHOUT 'id' to keep client UX identical while silently dropping. Verified with admin inbox count-delta = 0.

_coerce_dates accepts both ISO and 'YYYY-MM-DD' formats and returns the original string if neither parses — safe fallback. Round-trip serialization through serialize_doc converts datetime back to ISO string for client.
Resume upload: hardcoded 10MB cap + extension allow-list {pdf,doc,docx} + content-type passthrough. UUID-based path key avoids collisions. Good defensive validation.

Rate limiter is in-memory (defaultdict) and per-IP across all spam-sensitive endpoints; 8/10min is reasonable. Note: resets on backend restart and won't work across multiple worker processes — fine for current single-process deployment.
CORS allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True is unusual; since auth is Bearer (not cookie), credentials flag is functionally moot here, but consider tightening origins for production.
AdminDashboard.jsx DialogContent missing DialogDescription — emits a11y warning.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (admin login wrong+right, 7 nav tabs, full UI CRUD with date round-trip, logout, protected redirect, public apply+resume, public contact, admin inbox e2e, page titles)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@peninsulaagritrade.com / Peninsula@2026 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Public site: no auth.
seed_data_creation: Tests create then DELETE all CRUD items they make (TEST_ and UI_TEST_ prefixes). One UI_TEST_Applicant resume + one UI_TEST_Contact submission remain in DB as expected e2e artifacts (not cleaned up since they exercise the real inbox tab); harmless.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v (runs test_api.py + test_admin_auth.py = 29 tests). Admin login: data-testid admin-login-email/password/submit; success → /admin (data-testid admin-dashboard). Tabs: admin-nav-{insights|jobs|partners|memberships|contacts|inquiries|applications}. CRUD: admin-add-btn → admin-form-dialog → admin-field-{title|slug|category|excerpt|content|read_time|date|image|name|logo|...} → admin-save-btn; per-row admin-edit-{id}, admin-delete-{id}, admin-resume-{id}. Public forms: contact-form-{name|email|subject|message|submit}, contact-honeypot; job-apply-{name|email|phone|linkedin|cover-letter|resume}, apply-honeypot, careers-apply-submit-button. Token in localStorage key 'pa_admin_token'. Rate limit 8/10min per IP can fire on rapid form submissions across contact+inquiry+apply combined.
